---
title: '2014/05/17 Journal Sat'
date: '2014-05-17T12:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2428546214453978472'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/20140517-journal-sat.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

Rhythm... There is something about life's rhythm. Monday Through Friday then a weekend.<br />
<br />
Shadowing all week was interesting. Getting onto the computer late yesterday was even better.<br />
<br />
The kids always find me in the morning before I'm ready for them to find me.<br />
<br />
I feel so torn on all these blogs. I feel like I'm lacking direction again.<br />
<br />
<a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+Thoughts... A Blog By Darrell</a>&nbsp;I was just testing. You can link Google Pages by just putting a "+" in front of it. Cool!<br />
<br />
I'm thankful for my new job. For my home. For the healing that belongs to me.<br />
<br />
DW
